pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 13-14: PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/$PROJECT_NAME" where PROJECT_NAME="SecretDiary". Verified against export_result.sh line 7 which references the same path.

setup_task.sh: line 15 defines PACKAGE_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/java/com/example/secretdiary"; line 125 creates LoginActivity.kt in $PACKAGE_DIR. Verified against export_result.sh line 8 which references LOGIN_ACTIVITY="$PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/java/com/example/secretdiary/LoginActivity.kt"

setup_task.sh line 55: cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/app/build.gradle.kts" creates the file at the specified path relative to project_dir. Verified against export_result.sh line 9 which references BUILD_GRADLE="$PROJECT_DIR/app/build.gradle.kts"

task.json description explicitly states 'Add the androidx.biometric:biometric dependency (version 1.2.0-alpha05 or similar)'. Verified as a real official Android library via Android Developers: https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/biometric. Version 1.2.0-alpha05 confirmed to exist at https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/androidx.biometric/biometric-ktx/1.2.0-alpha05. verifier.py line 52 checks for presence of this dependency via regex: r'androidx\.biometric:biometric'

task.json description line 5: 'Configure the prompt with title Biometric Login and negative button text Cancel'. BiometricPrompt and PromptInfo.Builder are real Android APIs confirmed via https://developer.android.com/reference/android/hardware/biometrics/BiometricPrompt and https://developer.android.com/identity/sign-in/biometric-auth. Note: verifier.py line 68 checks for presence of '.setTitle(' but does NOT verify the specific title value is 'Biometric Login' - only that the method is called.

privileged_info_summary: This is an educational Android development task with all data synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. No sensitive information or privileged details. The task is about implementing biometric authentication in a sample 'SecretDiary' app. All metadata claims are verified: the project directory is created at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SecretDiary, LoginActivity.kt is placed at the correct path relative to project root, build.gradle.kts is generated at app/build.gradle.kts, the required dependency androidx.biometric:biometric is a real official Android library, and the expected prompt title 'Biometric Login' is documented in the task requirements. The verifier validates dependency addition, BiometricPrompt usage, PromptInfo configuration, and secure navigation logic (moving startActivity into the authentication success callback).
